name: voxtype
description: Install and set up voxtype — local, on-device voice dictation for macOS

interface.shortDescription: Install and set up voxtype voice dictation
interface.longDescription: Guides you through installing, configuring (via the voxtype setup wizard), and launching voxtype — local, fully on-device speech-to-text for macOS that types wherever your cursor is.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $voxtype to install and set up voxtype voice dictation.
